text.title: Agentic RAG Query Decomposition Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Final answer looks complete but is missing one of the user's intents; eval flags `partial-answer`.
antipattern.root-cause: Sub-query returned zero high-confidence chunks and was silently dropped instead of flagged.
antipattern.fix: Track per-sub-query high-confidence count. Surface zero-coverage sub-queries in the audit log; expand or block answer (per policy).

antipattern.symptom: Latency = sum(per-sub-query latencies) instead of max — 4-sub-query fanout takes 4× longer than necessary.
antipattern.root-cause: Loop over sub-queries with `await retrieve(sq)` blocks per-sub-query.
antipattern.fix: `results = await asyncio.gather(*[retrieve(sq) for sq in sub_queries])` or thread pool.

antipattern.symptom: Planner emits 8–10 sub-queries; retrieval cost balloons; context window overflows.
antipattern.root-cause: Planning prompt did not cap output; planner is rewarded for thoroughness.
antipattern.fix: Cap at 4 sub-queries in the planning prompt + enforce in code (keep top-4 by confidence; discard rest).
